message:
feat(conformance): add e-graph optimization semantics-preserving gate

Add fj-egraph dependency to fj-conformance. Add
egraph_preserves_semantics.rs testing that Jaxpr programs produce
identical results with and without e-graph optimization, ensuring
rewrite rules preserve numerical semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
